nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow triggered on push to main and on every pull request, running TypeScript typecheck, production build, and lint as quality gates.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-job workflow. The build job uses npm run build as a hard gate (tsc -b && vite build) while npm run lint runs with continue-on-error so it never blocks CI.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: The 'Typecheck, build, lint' job on ubuntu-latest: checks out the repo, sets up Node 20, installs dependencies with npm ci, runs the production build, then runs lint informationally.
